_comment: Bundled fallback affiliate codes. Replace AFFILIATE_API_BASE in sidepanel.js with your own API to serve these remotely.

_types.param: Inject a query-string parameter directly into the store URL (e.g. Amazon tag=)
_types.awin: Wrap the URL in an Awin deep-link redirect. Fields: mid (Awin merchant ID), affid (your Awin publisher ID)
_types.rakuten: Wrap the URL in a Rakuten/LinkShare deep link. Fields: publisherId, mid (merchant ID)
_types.cj: Wrap the URL in a Commission Junction deep link. Fields: publisherId, mid (merchant ID)

_networks.wayfair: Commission Junction or direct — param: refid
_networks.target: Impact Radius — impact.com (search 'Target') — param: irclickid or via deep link
_networks.westelm: Commission Junction — cj.com — publisher account required
_networks.aliexpress: AliExpress Portals — portals.aliexpress.com — param: aff_fcid + aff_trace_key
_networks.temu: Temu Affiliate — temu.com/affiliate — param-based after signup
_networks.jysk: Awin — awin.com (search 'JYSK') — mid varies by country
_networks.leroymerlin: Awin — awin.com (search 'Leroy Merlin') — varies by country
